items.name: Crow Shoulder Buddy
items.description:
His name is Onyx, and he's an awesome, adventure-ready crow buddy!

I made this guy with little blender to no experience, but I hope he satisfies buyers. He's going to be seasonal, as in, sometimes on sale, sometimes out, as I need premium to put him back on sale.

SMALL FLAW: Onyx floats a bit above your shoulder. I may have done an oopsie while adding the lil guy to Roblox, but it shouldn't be too noticeable.

I put this here because, though it impacts sales, I don't want people to be upset after buying this. It's my second ever blender project, so I'm bound to make mistakes, but I hope you still like it enough to buy him.

P.S - I had to raise the price a bit as roblox takes most of the money. I'm sorry :(
items.searchText:

items.name: Crown
items.description:

Inspired by iconic sword-fighting battles, this crown is made for true PvP legends. Perfect for classic sword maps, arena games, clans, tournaments, and avatar builds that honor the OG Roblox era. Dominate the battlefield in royal style.

items.name: Cute Cozy Black McBling Fur Winter Belt
items.description: Stay warm and stylish with the Cute Cozy Black McBling Fur Winter Belt! This belt brings together plush, soft black faux fur with a glamorous McBling vibe, making it an essential for the colder months. Perfect for adding a cozy yet chic touch to any outfit, it cinches at the waist to create a flattering silhouette, whether layered over coats, sweaters, or dresses. With its luxurious feel and retro-inspired style, this belt is the ultimate winter accessory for those who love a mix of comfort and sparkle!
